subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-30 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: At a time when the Europeans did not yet enjoy this ascendancy and influence, I had written to 'Abdu'l-Hamid, indicating to him what would come to pass
subcodes.first_line_orig: قبل از تسلّط و نفوذ اروپائیها حتّی بسلطان عبدالحمید نوشتم که چنین خواهد شد
subcodes.subjects: @constitutional revolution in Iran, @past, present and future of Iran, @relationship between government and people, @predictions and prophecies
